plugin.manager_description: Manage installed plugins and browse the plugin registry
plugin.empty_description: Place plugin folders in ~/.oxideterm/plugins/ to get started.
plugin.registry_empty: No plugins available in the registry.
plugin.url_install_desc: Paste a link to a plugin ZIP package or a GitHub repository to install it directly.
plugin.url_invalid: Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
plugin.url_disclaimer: Third-party plugins are provided by their respective developers. OxideTerm serves only as a runtime host and does not review, endorse, or assume any responsibility for third-party plugin content, functionality, or legality. By installing a plugin, you acknowledge that you bear full responsibility for evaluating its safety and compliance with applicable laws and regulations. Install only from sources you trust.
plugin.url_version_hint: Supports locking versions via #tag or #branch for GitHub repository URLs
plugin.url_checksum_hint: If the author publishes a checksum, paste it here to verify the download. The actual SHA-256 of the installed package will be shown after install for manual comparison.
plugin.url_conflict_desc: A plugin with ID "{{pluginId}}" is already installed. Overwrite the existing plugin with the newly downloaded one?
plugin.url_conflict_cancelled: Installation cancelled. The existing plugin was kept.
